description: PMD/Copado SARIF triage + FSC-specific augmentation. The FSC review checklist always injects 2 HIGH findings, so the quality gate (0 HIGH/CRITICAL) fails in every case in this fixture — that invariant is itself worth locking down.

cases.name: no_sarif_still_finds_fsc_specific_issues_and_fails_gate
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — the FSC review checklist runs even with no scanner output, and the gate fails because of it

cases.name: naming_convention_noise_is_suppressed_not_reported_as_a_defect
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — style/naming rules are noise, not defects; they must be suppressed with a reason, not silently dropped or treated as real findings

cases.name: soql_injection_finding_is_categorised_as_security_high
cases.labelled_by: Security reviewer — a SOQL-injection-pattern finding must be categorised SECURITY, mapped to CWE-89, at HIGH severity

findings.message: dynamic SOQL built from user input
